openQuestions.question: Q1 raw answer capture (N1): approve reversing the aggregates-only stance + pick a data source, or descope to aggregates for v1?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Descope to aggregates for v1; AI Answer Monitor as an individually-flagged follow-up.

openQuestions.question: Q2 prompt-set curation: who defines/edits the tracked prompt list?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Admin-curated, seeded from keyword strategy; spec with N1.

openQuestions.question: Q3 multi-engine (N2): which engines are procurable?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Ship single-engine (ChatGPT) honestly; no fake engine chips.

openQuestions.question: Q4 AeoReview home (C3-C7): drill-in behind 'Improve', stay in Site Audit, or redesign?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Keep as a Drawer drill-in behind the AI Search Ready 'Improve' action, preserving the full job + filters + send-to-client pipeline.

openQuestions.question: Q5 score definition (N8/A8/A9): SoV×100 or a new composite, and where does 'not measured' render?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: SoV×100 with an explicit 'not measured' state (server already distinguishes undefined SoV).

openQuestions.question: Q6 graduation rule (N6) threshold + mechanics into client Insights Engine.
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Defer entirely; define as a C3-era cross-surface contract.

openQuestions.question: Q7 zone assignment: Search & Site Health (Handoff Brief) vs Brand & AI (Parity Ledger + prototype banner).
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Search & Site Health (matches the Handoff Brief 18-surface map and this ledger's header).

openQuestions.question: Q8 weekly scheduled scans (N7): approve cron + budget enforcement or keep manual?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Manual refresh at launch with honest freshness copy; cron as follow-up (sn-ai-visibility-3).

openQuestions.question: Q9 Workspace Settings LLMs.txt tab retirement + deep-link redirect (B13).
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Retire the tab; redirect workspace-settings?tab=llms-txt → this surface's manifest section (D8 redirect map).

openQuestions.question: Q10 branded-demand split (N5): this surface or Search & Traffic?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Search & Traffic owns it; omit here.

openQuestions.question: SoV % bar denominator (A12): counts→% mapping needs a definition.
openQuestions.proposedDefault: share = brand mentions ÷ (owner + all co-mentioned competitor mentions), computed client-side (not money/verdict).

openQuestions.question: Exact aeo-* check → 5 readiness-row mapping for the AI Search Ready card (8 checks, 5 prototype rows).
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Define the grouping in sn-ai-visibility-1's derivation module at build time; render all 8 (grouped) rather than dropping 3.

verdicts.evidence: Exactly 8 aeo-* checks exist (server/audit-page.ts:59-62; distinct literals aeo-author/date/answer-first/faq-no-schema/hidden-content/citations/dark-patterns/trust-pages). Per-page AeoPageReview.overallScore exists (shared/types/aeo.ts:41) but the type has NO site-level readiness-rows/score field; AeoSiteReview (shared/types/aeo.ts:47) aggregates page counts only, no readiness rows. Routes are POST /page (aeo-review.ts:40), GET / (aeo-review.ts:96), POST /site (aeo-review.ts:104) — no /readiness GET exists. 'partial' + effort S stands. Adjacent note: an unrelated assembleSetupReadiness (server/the-issue-readiness.ts:36) exists for The-Issue client setup gates — NOT reusable for AEO readiness; don't cross-wire it.

grep -c 'chatgpt\.com|perplexity|gemini' server src → exit 1 (zero matches). The only 'chatgpt/perplexity' hits are the word 'ChatGPT' in AEO prose (server/aeo-page-review.ts prompt) and the platform id 'chat_gpt' (server/llm-mentions.ts:35) — neither is a GA4 referrer-domain segmentation. No AI-referral session segmentation or MoM delta exists. 'no' + effort M stands; caller correctly gates it owner-decision (N4).

server/cron-registry.ts CRON_METADATA (lines 150-378) enumerates 24 crons; none is LLM_MENTIONS/llm-mentions/ai-visibility (nearest is 'rank-tracking' at :274, a separate national-SERP job). The LLM refresh is route-triggered only: BACKGROUND_JOB_TYPES.LLM_MENTIONS_REFRESH is used solely at server/routes/rank-tracking.ts:169 (POST /refresh-ai-visibility), with no scheduler wiring. 'no' + effort S stands. Caveat for the plan: adding to CRON_METADATA also requires the tests/contract/cron-registry-census.test.ts anti-drift update — S is fair but not zero.

Aggregates-only is explicit: server/routes/rank-tracking.ts:190-193 comment 'Never returns raw LLM transcripts/answers (the store holds none).' The GET /ai-visibility response (rank-tracking.ts:196-207) serializes only latest/trend/competitors/sourceDomains. llm-mentions-store header (server/llm-mentions-store.ts:2-8) confirms the llm_mention_snapshots table stores counts/domains/share-of-voice JSON only — no per-prompt transcript or tracked-prompt table. No DataForSEO ChatGPT-scraper capability on the provider interface. 'no' + effort L stands (new migration + row-mapper lockstep + provider capability = genuinely L).

shareOfVoice 0..1 exists (server/llm-mentions.ts:37-38 interface) and the dated trend is serialized (rank-tracking.ts:198-200). grep for composite|visibility.?score|aiVisibilityScore over server/llm-mentions.ts + rank-tracking.ts → exit 1 (no composite metric anywhere). The intelligence slice (shared/types/intelligence.ts:243-258) also exposes only mentions/shareOfVoice/topCompetitor/topSourceDomain — no /100 composite. 'partial' + effort S stands; it is a pure server-side derivation on the existing GET, consistent with S.

grep 'branded' in server/routes/*.ts hits only branded-HTML export naming (public-content.ts:555, content-briefs.ts:228, content-posts.ts:442). A broader branded.?(search|demand|volume|split) grep finds only competitor-brand-FILTER logic (server/competitor-brand-filter.ts:105; keyword-strategy-synthesis/prompts.ts:278) — that's 'exclude competitor brand tokens', NOT a branded-vs-nonbranded DEMAND split KPI. No branded search-volume/mo metric exists. 'no' + effort M stands; whereItLives (GSC/keyword domain, not this surface) is accurate.

Inputs exist: sourceDomains is serialized (server/routes/rank-tracking.ts:206) and GBP review data lives in the google_business_review_responses table (referenced server/outcome-source-integrity-sweep-job.ts:88,115). But no assembled authority-signals read joining owned-content-cited + NAP/reviews + roundup-presence exists — the aiVisibility intelligence slice (shared/types/intelligence.ts:243-258) surfaces only mentions/shareOfVoice/topCompetitor/topSourceDomain, and server/llm-mentions.ts performs no such join. 'partial' + effort M stands; it is genuinely a net-new projection/assembler over existing inputs.
